source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select a.[Associate ID],a.[Job Title Description],a.[Last Name],a.[First Name],a.[Work Contact: Work Email],a.[Location State/Territory],a.IsManagementPosition,
a.[Home Department Description],a.[Reports To Associate ID],a.[Reports to Email],a.[Reports To Legal First Name],a.[Reports To Legal Last Name],
a.[Business Unit Description],a.Level,a.[Hire Date],a.[Years of Service],a.[New Hire],a.[Position Effective Date],a.Division,a.[Payroll Company Name],
a.[Associate_ID],a.Is_Management_Position,a.[Reports_To_Associate_ID],a.IsNewManager,a.[Job Status],a.[Termination Date],a.[System Status],a.[NAICS Workers' Comp Code],
Coalesce(b.No_Of_Direct_Reports,0) as No_Of_Direct_Reports,a.FLSADescription--,c.FLSADescription 
from ( 
Select  T1.EmployeeId as [Associate ID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [Job Title Description], T1.LastName as [Last Name], T1.Firstname as [First Name], 
RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [Location State/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [Home Department Description],
T1.ManagerId as [Reports To Associate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ')  as [Reports to Email], T2.Firstname as [Reports To Legal First Name], T2.LastName as [Reports To Legal Last Name], 
T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [Business Unit Description], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [Hire Date], T1.YearsOfService as [Years of Service],
case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [New Hire],
T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [Position Effective Date], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [Payroll Company Name], 
T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
T1.PositionStatus as [Job Status] , T1.TerminationDate  as [Termination Date],
Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [System Status],
T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICS Workers' Comp Code],T1.FLSADescription
From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId

where T1.POsitionStatus='Active' and 
T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'


Union 

Select  T1.EmployeeId as [Associate ID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [Job Title Description], T1.LastName as [Last Name], T1.Firstname as [First Name], 
RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [Location State/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [Home Department Description],
T1.ManagerId as [Reports To Associate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Reports to Email], T2.Firstname as [Reports To Legal First Name], T2.LastName as [Reports To Legal Last Name], 
T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [Business Unit Description], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [Hire Date], T1.YearsOfService as [Years of Service],
case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [New Hire],
T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [Position Effective Date], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [Payroll Company Name], 
T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
T1.PositionStatus as [Job Status] , T1.TerminationDate  as [Termination Date],
Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [System Status],
T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICS Workers' Comp Code],T1.FLSADescription
From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId

where T1.POsitionStatus<>'Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
And ( T1.HireDate>'2025-07-23' or T1.TerminationDate>'2025-07-30')-- Hardcoded to consider base data as of 31-07
)a Left join 
(
Select M.EmployeeID,
count(distinct E.EmployeeId )As No_Of_Direct_Reports
from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager M Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee E  on M.EmployeeId=E.ManagerId
Group by M.EmployeeID
)b on a.[Associate ID]=EmployeeID

Select a.[Associate ID],a.[Job Title Description],a.[Last Name],a.[First Name],a.[Work Contact: Work Email],a.[Location State/Territory],a.IsManagementPosition,
a.[Home Department Description],a.[Reports To Associate ID],a.[Reports to Email],a.[Reports To Legal First Name],a.[Reports To Legal Last Name],
a.[Business Unit Description],a.Level,a.[Hire Date],a.[Years of Service],a.[New Hire],a.[Position Effective Date],a.Division,a.[Payroll Company Name],
a.[Associate_ID],a.Is_Management_Position,a.[Reports_To_Associate_ID],a.IsNewManager,a.[Job Status],a.[Termination Date],a.[System Status],a.[NAICS Workers' Comp Code],
Coalesce(b.No_Of_Direct_Reports,0) as No_Of_Direct_Reports,a.FLSADescription--,c.FLSADescription 
from ( 
Select  T1.EmployeeId as [Associate ID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [Job Title Description], T1.LastName as [Last Name], T1.Firstname as [First Name], 
RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [Location State/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [Home Department Description],
T1.ManagerId as [Reports To Associate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ')  as [Reports to Email], T2.Firstname as [Reports To Legal First Name], T2.LastName as [Reports To Legal Last Name], 
T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [Business Unit Description], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [Hire Date], T1.YearsOfService as [Years of Service],
case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [New Hire],
T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [Position Effective Date], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [Payroll Company Name], 
T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
T1.PositionStatus as [Job Status] , T1.TerminationDate  as [Termination Date],
Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [System Status],
T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICS Workers' Comp Code],T1.FLSADescription
From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId

where T1.POsitionStatus='Active' and 
T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'


Union 

Select  T1.EmployeeId as [Associate ID], T1.JobTitleDescription as [Job Title Description], T1.LastName as [Last Name], T1.Firstname as [First Name], 
RTrim(T1.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Work Contact: Work Email],
Concat(T1.StateTaxCode,' - ', T1.STateTaxDescription) as [Location State/Territory], T1.IsManagementPosition, T1.HomeDepartmentDescription as [Home Department Description],
T1.ManagerId as [Reports To Associate ID], Rtrim(T2.WorkEmail,'  ') as [Reports to Email], T2.Firstname as [Reports To Legal First Name], T2.LastName as [Reports To Legal Last Name], 
T1.BusinessUnitDescription as [Business Unit Description], T1.Level, T1.HireDate as [Hire Date], T1.YearsOfService as [Years of Service],
case when T1.Hiredate >= Dateadd(D,-90,Getdate()) then 'Yes' else 'No' end [New Hire],
T1.PositionEffectiveDate as [Position Effective Date], T1.Division, T1.PayrollCompanyName as [Payroll Company Name], 
T1.EmployeeId as  [Associate_ID], T1.IsManagementPosition as Is_Management_Position, T1.ManagerId as [Reports_To_Associate_ID],
Coalesce(T2.IsNewManager,'No') as IsNewManager, 
T1.PositionStatus as [Job Status] , T1.TerminationDate  as [Termination Date],
Case when T1.Positionstatus in ('Active','Leave') then '1' else '0' end as [System Status],
T1.NAICSWorkersCompCode as [NAICS Workers' Comp Code],T1.FLSADescription
From EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 
--Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T2 on T1.ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId
Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager T2 On T1. ManagerId=T2.EmployeeId

where T1.POsitionStatus<>'Active' and T1.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
And ( T1.HireDate>'2025-07-23' or T1.TerminationDate>'2025-07-30')-- Hardcoded to consider base data as of 31-07
)a Left join 
(
Select M.EmployeeID,
count(distinct E.EmployeeId )As No_Of_Direct_Reports
from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee_Manager M Left join EDW.DIM_HR_Employee E  on M.EmployeeId=E.ManagerId
Group by M.EmployeeID
)b on a.[Associate ID]=EmployeeID
